case_title: DERRICK D PAYNE VS. ROWENA T LIBANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF PAYNE, DERRICK D ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAYNE, DERRICK D ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2010 BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PAYNE, DERRICK D AS TO DEFENDANT LIBANG, ROWENA T SB #184839 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAYNE, DERRICK D IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIBANG, ROWENA T SB #184839 THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED DID NOT ESTABLISH INDIVIDUAL LIABILITY OF THE DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-26-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIBANG, ROWENA T SB #184839
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
